---
title: "Science Writing for Beginners"
page-layout: article
toc: true
---

<div class="sc-page-hero">
  <p class="sc-eyebrow">Writing · Jun 14, 2025 · Free</p>
  <h1>Science Writing for Beginners</h1>
  <p>Transform dense research into engaging stories. For scientists, researchers, and enthusiasts who want to write for non-specialist audiences.</p>
  <div style="display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:20px;font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-faint);">
    <span>📅 Jun 14, 2025</span>
    <span>🕐 2 hours</span>
    <span>🆓 Free</span>
    <span>👥 20 places</span>
    <span>📍 The Common Room</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div style="max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 40px 32px;">

This workshop is for scientists, researchers, and science enthusiasts who want to write for non-specialist audiences but don't know where to start.

## What we'll cover

- How to find the human story inside a research paper
- Structure: the inverted pyramid vs. narrative approaches
- Writing the first sentence (the hardest part)
- Plain language techniques that don't dumb things down
- How to pitch your story to a publication or blog

No writing experience necessary. Bring a piece of your own research or a paper you find interesting — we'll workshop it together.

::: {.callout-note}
## What to bring
A research paper or topic you'd like to write about, and a laptop or notebook. Tea and coffee provided.
:::

**Facilitator:** Maya Patel, Co-founder & Editor

</div>

<section class="sc-section" style="background:var(--paper-warm);">
  <div class="sc-inner-form">
    <div class="sc-label">Register</div>
    <p style="font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-muted);margin-bottom:24px;">Free to attend — register so we can confirm your place.</p>
    <div class="sc-form">
      <div>
        <label class="sc-label-text">Full name</label>
        <input type="text" class="sc-input" placeholder="Your name">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="sc-label-text">Email address</label>
        <input type="email" class="sc-input" placeholder="you@example.com">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="sc-label-text">Tell us a bit about yourself (optional)</label>
        <textarea class="sc-input" rows="3" placeholder="Researcher, writer, student..."></textarea>
      </div>
      <button onclick="document.getElementById('ws-confirm').style.display='block'" class="btn btn-teal">Register →</button>
      <p id="ws-confirm" class="sc-confirm">✓ You're registered! We'll send details closer to the date.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
